courses.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou)

timeline.title: Research Assistant
timeline.summary: Legged robot agility control via deep RL under Prof. Changhao Chen.
highlights: Designed FiLM-modulated Mamba policy and EKF-based neural velocity estimator for extreme agility.
Applied Consistency-aware loss gating to stabilize policy distillation under large-scale domain randomization.
Achieved zero-shot transfer on Unitree Go2 at ~13.1 ms/step inference latency.
First author on paper 'REAL' currently under review.

timeline.title: Robotic Software Engineer Intern
highlights: Developed ROS2 end-to-end control pipeline for DexMano / 高山D22 PRO dexterous hand and UR16e arm.
Optimized arm path planning with MoveIt! and real-time feedback.
Built CAN/RS485 real-time communication protocol at 100Hz+ for tendon-driven dexterous hand.
Company backed by MiraclePlus (YC China) with AMD (Xilinx) embodied AI compute platform partnership.
